imageData.description: Description of the image data for this source, including the file format and the location of the data.

bdv.hdf5.description: Data stored in the bdv.hdf5 format, i.e. hdf5 data that is stored on the local fileystem.

relativePath.description: The file path to the xml storing the bdv metadata, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the xml storing the bdv metadata.

channel.description: Optional setup to display from the bdv.xml, in case it contains multiple setups.

bdv.n5.description: Data stored in the bdv.n5 format, i.e. n5 data that is stored on the local fileystem.

relativePath.description: The file path to the xml storing the bdv metadata, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the xml storing the bdv metadata.

channel.description: Optional setup to display from the bdv.xml, in case it contains multiple setups.

bdv.n5.s3.description: Data stored in the bdv.n5.s3 format, i.e. n5 data that is stored on a s3 object store.

relativePath.description: The file path to the xml storing the bdv metadata, relative to the dataset root location.

channel.description: Optional setup to display from the bdv.xml, in case it contains multiple setups.

bdv.ome.zarr.description: Data stored in the bdv.ome.zarr format, i.e. ome.zarr data that is stored on the local fileystem with additional bdv xml metadata. This data format is deprecated, please use ome.zarr instead.

relativePath.description: The file path to the xml storing the bdv metadata, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the xml storing the bdv metadata.

channel.description: Optional setup to display from the bdv.xml, in case it contains multiple setups.

bdv.ome.zarr.s3.description: Data stored in the bdv.ome.zarr.s3 format, i.e. ome.zarr data that is stored on a s3 object store with additional bdv xml metadata. This data format is deprecated, please use ome.zarr.s3 instead.

relativePath.description: The file path to the xml storing the bdv metadata, relative to the dataset root location.

channel.description: Optional setup to display from the bdv.xml, in case it contains multiple setups.

ome.zarr.description: Data stored in the ome.zarr format, i.e. ome.zarr data that is stored on the local fileystem.

relativePath.description: The file path to the ome.zarr file, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the ome.zarr file.

channel.description: Optional channel to display from the ome.zarr file, in case it contains multiple channels.

ome.zarr.s3.description: Data stored in the ome.zarr.s3 format, i.e. ome.zarr data that is stored on a s3 object store.

s3Address.description: The s3 address for this image data.

signingRegion.description: The signing region for aws, e.g. us-east-1

channel.description: Optional channel to display from the ome.zarr file, in case it contains multiple channels.

openOrganelle.s3.description: Data stored in the openOrganelle file format on a s3 object store.

s3Address.description: The s3 address for this image data.

signingRegion.description: The signing region for aws, e.g. us-east-1

channel.description: Optional channel to display from the open organelle file, in case it contains multiple channels.

tiff.description: Data stored in the tiff format on the local filesystem.

relativePath.description: The file path to the tiff file, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the tiff file.

channel.description: Optional channel to display from the tiff file, in case it contains multiple channels.

imagej.description: Data stored in an ImageJ-compatible format on the local filesystem.

relativePath.description: The file path to the ImageJ file, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the ImageJ file.

channel.description: Optional channel to display from the ImageJ file, in case it contains multiple channels.

bioformats.description: Data read via Bio-Formats on the local filesystem.

relativePath.description: The file path to the dataset file, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the dataset file.

channel.description: Optional channel to display from the dataset file, in case it contains multiple channels.

bioformats.s3.description: Data read via Bio-Formats from an s3 object store.

s3Address.description: The s3 address for this image data.

signingRegion.description: The signing region for aws, e.g. us-east-1

channel.description: Optional channel to display from the dataset, in case it contains multiple channels.

n5.description: Data stored in the n5 format on the local filesystem.

relativePath.description: The file path to the n5 root folder, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the n5 root folder.

channel.description: Optional channel to display from the n5 dataset, in case it contains multiple channels.

spimData.description: Data stored in the spimData format on the local filesystem.

relativePath.description: The file path to the spimData xml, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the spimData xml.

channel.description: Optional setup to display from the spimData xml, in case it contains multiple setups.

ims.description: Data stored in the Imaris (.ims) format on the local filesystem.

relativePath.description: The file path to the .ims file, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the .ims file.

channel.description: Optional channel to display from the .ims file, in case it contains multiple channels.

ilastik.description: Data stored in the ilastik format on the local filesystem.

relativePath.description: The file path to the ilastik file, relative to the dataset root location.

absolutePath.description: The absolute file path to the ilastik file.

tableData.description: Description of the table data for this source, including the format and the location of the table data.

tsv.description: Table data in tsv file format, specified as root location for the folder with tables. The folder MUST contain the table default.tsv, which will always be loaded as the first table for this source; this table MUST contain the mandatory columns for the given source type.

relativePath.description: The relative path of the table data w.r.t the dataset root location.

csv.description: Table data in csv file format, specified as root location for the folder with tables. The folder MUST contain the table default.csv, which will always be loaded as the first table for this source; this table MUST contain the mandatory columns for the given source type.

relativePath.description: The relative path of the table data w.r.t the dataset root location.

parquet.description: Table data in parquet file format, specified as root location for the folder with tables. The folder MUST contain the table default.parquet, which will always be loaded as the first table for this source; this table MUST contain the mandatory columns for the given source type.

relativePath.description: The relative path of the table data w.r.t the dataset root location.

excel.description: Table data in excel file format, specified as root location for the folder with tables. The folder MUST contain the table default.xlsx, which will always be loaded as the first table for this source; this table MUST contain the mandatory columns for the given source type.

relativePath.description: The relative path of the table data w.r.t the dataset root location.

resultsTable.description: In-memory table data represented as an ImageJ ResultsTable.

table.description: In-memory table data represented as a Tablesaw table.

imageSource.description: An image source. The source name (=key for this source entry) must be the same as the setup name in the bdv.xml.

segmentationSource.description: A segmentation source. The source name (=key for this source entry) must be the same as the setup name in the bdv.xml.

spotSource.description: A spot source, corresponding to a collection of points loaded from a table. The table must contain the columns 'spot_id', as well as 'x', 'y', 'z' ('z' is not required for 2d datasets.)

boundingBoxMin.description: The minimum of the bounding box of physical cooridinates for the spots.

boundingBoxMax.description: The maximum of the bounding box of physical cooridinates for the spots.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the coordinate system, e.g. micrometer or nanometer

regionSource.description: A region table, corresponding to a image region attributes. The table must contain the column 'region_id'. Can be referenced in regionDisplays
